heading_title: Token symbols can cause a revert on pair creation
content:
L-01 Token symbols can cause a revert on pair creation
File(s): utils.cairo, pair.cairo

Description: Generating pair symbols does not check token symbol length and can revert during pair creation.
let (pair_mix, mix_multiplier) = join_short_strings(token_0_symbol, '/', token_1_symbol);

Recommendation: Use byte31 arrays for string operations or validate symbol lengths before joining.

heading_title: The swap fee can be higher than the limit
content:
L-02 The swap fee can be higher than the limit
File(s): factory.cairo, pair.cairo

Description: The swap_fee parameter is passed directly into pair constructor calldata and can exceed 10000, which causes swap errors in the pair contract.
fn create_pair(ref self: ContractState, token_a: ContractAddress, token_b: ContractAddress, swap_fee: u16) -> ContractAddress { ... }

Recommendation: Validate swap_fee bounds before deploying the pair contract.

heading_title: Selector callback for transferFrom is unnecessary
Wrong starknet version specified in scarb.toml
content:
I-03 Wrong starknet version specified in scarb.toml
File(s): scarb.toml

Description: The Starknet dependency version in Scarb config is inconsistent with the rest of the dependency set.
[dependencies]
starknet = "2.2.0"

Recommendation: Align starknet version with the repo toolchain target (the report recommends 2.4.0).

heading_title: Use internal traits for internal contract methods
content:
BP-01 Use internal traits for internal contract methods
File(s): router.cairo, factory.cairo, pair.cairo

Description: Internal methods defined only in external traits do not get direct state access, forcing explicit state plumbing across calls.

Recommendation: Move internal-only behavior into internal traits to reduce boilerplate and improve clarity.

BP-03 Unnecessary assert statement
File(s): factory.cairo

Description: sort_token_pair already enforces non-zero token addresses, so this assert may be redundant.
assert(token_0.is_non_zero(), 'ZERO_ADDRESS');

Recommendation: Remove duplicate checks when preconditions are already guaranteed upstream.

BP-04 Store strings as byte31 array
File(s): utils.cairo

Description: Cairo 2.5.0 introduces byte31 arrays, which are better suited for many string storage and string manipulation paths.

Recommendation: Use byte31 arrays where feasible for string operations and persisted string data.
